channel.title: causalforest on Philipp Schmalen
channel.description: Recent content in causalforest on Philipp Schmalen

item.title: Causal Forest for Heterogeneity Analyses
item.description: To do Methodology ppt scheme: change Leaf l to gamma - [x] list criteria that influence splits (e.g. min.node.size) - [ ] treatment estimation? - [ ] Properties: i. asymptotics ii. unbiased estimates - [ ] parameter tuning: Cross validation, train/validate/test - [ ] variable definitions Final steps generate TOC https://ecotrust-canada.github.io/markdown-toc/ A practitioners guide to Causal Forest Estimate conditional average treatment effects (CATE) with causal forest (Athey et al.
